title: Directors, Religious Activities and Education
description: Coordinate or design programs and conduct outreach to promote the religious education or activities of a denominational group. May provide counseling, guidance, and leadership relative to marital, health, financial, and religious problems.

tasks.text: Develop or direct study courses or religious education programs within congregations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Identify and recruit potential volunteer workers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Select appropriate curricula or class structures for educational programs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Schedule special events, such as camps, conferences, meetings, seminars, or retreats.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Counsel individuals regarding interpersonal, health, financial, or religious problems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Collaborate with other ministry members to establish goals and objectives for religious education programs or to develop ways to encourage program participation.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Train and supervise religious education instructional staff.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Implement program plans by ordering needed materials, scheduling speakers, reserving space, or handling other administrative details.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Analyze member participation or changes in congregational emphasis to determine needs for religious education.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Analyze revenue and program cost data to determine budget priorities.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Attend workshops, seminars, or conferences to obtain program ideas, information, or resources.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Visit congregational members' homes or arrange for pastoral visits to provide information or resources regarding religious education programs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Publicize programs through sources, such as newsletters, bulletins, or mailings.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Confer with clergy members, congregational officials, or congregational organizations to encourage support of or participation in religious education activities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plan fundraising activities for the church.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Locate and distribute resources, such as periodicals or curricula, to enhance the effectiveness of educational programs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Participate in denominational activities aimed at goals, such as promoting interfaith understanding or providing aid to new or small congregations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Interpret religious education activities to the public through speaking, leading discussions, or writing articles for local or national publications.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plan or conduct conferences dealing with the interpretation of religious ideas or convictions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
